raw_title: When Software Becomes the Newsroom: Journalists and the Loss of Organizational Connections
title_en: When Software Becomes the Newsroom: Journalists and the Loss of Organizational Connections
title_zh: 当软件成为新闻编辑室：记者与组织联系的丧失
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了当新闻编辑室越来越多地依赖软件和自动化技术时，记者们如何逐渐失去与组织的传统联系。它研究了技术变革对新闻工作实践和组织结构的影响。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how journalists are losing traditional organizational connections as newsrooms increasingly rely on software and automation technologies. It explores the impact of technological changes on journalistic practices and organizational structures.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻编辑室的技术转型及其对记者职业身份、工作实践和组织关系的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the technological transformation of newsrooms in the digital age and its impact on journalists' professional identity, work practices, and organizational relationships.
